results.title: Mira Care | BBB Complaints | Better Business Bureau
results.content:
Date:06/15/2026

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We sincerely apologize for the experience Ms. REMOVED had with her device and for any frustration caused by the delay in communication.

Upon reviewing this case, our team did reach out and provided troubleshooting steps on November 29, 2025. A replacement device was also issued. We did not receive a response following those communications, and we are glad to see that Ms. REMOVED has continued using the Mira REMOVED which indicates the issue was resolved.

We remain committed to providing timely and effective support to all of our customers. Should Ms. REMOVED or any customer need further assistance, our team is always available to help.   
   ### Initial Complaint

Date:10/21/2025 [...] Date:06/15/2026

Thank you for the opportunity to respond to REMOVED complaint. We understand her frustration and want to explain the situation as clearly as possible.

After reviewing her case, the lab determined that the sample received did not meet the minimum volume threshold required to process all biomarkers in the Panorama panel. This classification is referred to as Quantity Not Sufficient, or REMOVED, and means the lab was unable to run the test accurately or completely. This requirement exists to ensure the reliability of results and is a standard lab protocol.

We recognize that REMOVED took care in collecting her sample, and we are truly sorry this was the outcome. The kit instructions do include access to a collection success call, which is [...] We regret the frustration caused by the shipping issue and appreciate the customers patience while we confirm the shipment status. Mira Care remains committed to resolving customer concerns fairly and promptly.

    
   ### Initial Complaint

Date:11/14/2025

Type:Product Issues Status:Answered More info## Complaint statuses

results.title: How to Ask for Customer Feedback: The Importance of Reviews for Your Trade Business | Mira
results.content:
### Technical barriers

The process of leaving reviews can sometimes be overly difficult or time-consuming which only discourages customers from completing one. There can also be platform limitations if the site is not user-friendly to customers. Requiring customers to create an account to leave a review or dealing with occasional glitches can further frustrate them. Try to make sure there are as few steps as possible to the customer feedback process.

## Essential elements of an effective customer review template [...] ## How to respond to customer feedback

Having a customer feedback program is almost worthless if you don’t spend time reviewing what is being said about you, and acting on it. When you receive feedback, whether it’s positive or negative, express your thanks that the customer took the time to give it. If it’s negative or critical, apologise where you can and take responsibility. This shows the customer that it matters to you and you want to make a better impact going forward. [...] Here's a free customer review template for you to share with your customers if you don't know where to start.

## Start growing your business!

By following these tips, you can collect valuable feedback to improve your service and grow your business. If you'd like to step it up a notch and take your business to the next level? Sign up for a free trial of Mira today.

results.content:
“Signed up as better solution, However was mislead/misrepresented during the sign up process on the services provided. This was suppose to be a viable solution that would take over services from NorthWest. However, only to find out the main service I needed (termites) was not covered in the fine print and never stated during the sign up process. Current I now have two pest services since they refused to cancel the contract without a $300 cancellation fee and paid a second sign up process for NorthWest. I'm now taking this one on the chin and paying for two services to complete the contact and my insurance obligations. However I hope no one else uses this service as a comprehensive solution for GA pests. A painful lesson which I will never make again and I hope no one else had to [...] Posted 2 weeks ago
